trending_videos.title: Championship: UConn vs. Michigan
trending_videos.description: Michigan and UConn meet at Lucas Oil Stadium for the national title. The Wolverines seek the Big Ten's first championship since 2000 despite an injury to Yaxel Lendeborg. Dan Hurley's Huskies eye a third ring in four years after beating Illinois.

trending_videos.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Final Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Watch the new trailer for The Devil Wears Prada 2 with original song “Runway” performed by Lady Gaga and Doechii. Get tickets now and experience the film only in theaters May 1: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel—Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as “Lily” and “Irv” from the first film. 
 
“The Devil Wears Prada 2” is produced by Wendy Finer

trending_videos.title: Special Report With Bret Baier
trending_videos.description: Former Fox News chief White House correspondent Bret Baier takes a closer look at political stories from Washington, DC.

trending_videos.title: Honest Trailers | Avatar: Fire and Ash
trending_videos.description:
Well paint me blue and call me Na’vi, it’s time for another one a them Avatar movies! Fire and Ash? More like tired and a$$. James Cameron get yourself out the ocean and go fix the Terminator franchise you old so and so.

Voice Narration: Jon Bailey the EPIC VOICE GUY (@epicvoiceguy on all socials)
Title Design: Robert Holtby
Written by: Spencer Gilbert and Lon Harris
Produced by: Spencer Gilbert
Edited by: Kevin Williamsen
Post-Production Manager: Emin Bassavand
Manager, Video Operations: Tiffany Tse
Post-Production Specialist: Rebecca Castaneda
VP Content: Max Dionne

trailers_and_entertainment.description: There is a strong presence of entertainment content, particularly trailers for movies and TV shows.
trailers_and_entertainment.insight: Trailers for upcoming releases are a significant portion of trending content, indicating a high viewer interest in upcoming entertainment releases.

news_and_reports.description: News content also has a notable presence in the trending videos.
news_and_reports.insight: News segments are trending, suggesting an active viewer interest in current events and political updates.

sports_content.description: A notable portion of trending videos is related to sports events.
sports_content.insight: Live sports events or highlights are engaging content for viewers, highlighting an opportunity to further explore this category.

humor_and_comedy.description: Comedy or humorous content also finds a place in trending videos.
humor_and_comedy.insight: Humorous content continues to attract viewers, suggesting a consistent demand for entertaining and light-hearted videos.

diversity_of_channels.description: The trending videos are produced by a diverse set of channels, with no single channel dominating the list.
diversity_of_channels.insight: The variety of creators indicates a healthy competition and diverse content offering, which may encourage cross-promotion and collaborations.

top_channels.description: Channels like A24 and Adult Swim are in the top list, known for entertainment content.
top_channels.insight: Channels with a focus on entertainment and trailers are more likely to trend, indicating a strong viewer preference for these types of content from established creators.

emerging_categories.description: While trailers and news dominate, there is room for growth in other categories.

opportunities.rationale: With no current representation, these categories can attract a new audience segment.
Creating engaging educational content may capture interest from viewers seeking informative videos.

collaboration_potential.insight: Creators can leverage collaborations, particularly between news and entertainment, to expand audience reach and diversify content.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
